material_warnings.name: inherits_r1_t04_window_dependent_state_identity
material_warnings.rationale: R1-T04 final gate recorded window-dependent state identity; R1-T05 describes indicator-level availability and overlap without selecting W.

material_warnings.name: inherits_r1_t04_confirmation_population_k_sensitivity
material_warnings.rationale: R1-T05 is K-not-applicable and does not remove the R1-T04 confirmation population warning.

material_warnings.name: inherits_r1_t04_pcvt_confirmed_high_fragmentation
material_warnings.rationale: R1-T05 reports indicator and joint-hit duration fragments but does not alter PCVT confirmation semantics.

material_warnings.name: C_layer_near_redundancy
material_warnings.rationale: C layer remains below the frozen redundancy threshold, but its two indicators are materially closer than P/T/V.

material_warnings.name: V_layer_W_dependent_identity
material_warnings.rationale: V layer intralayer relationship weakens materially as W increases; this is a diagnostic input for the inherited R1-T04 window-dependent warning.

material_warnings.name: T1_ER20_W120_Q10_high_fragment_rate
material_warnings.rationale: High single-day hit fragmentation is reported for scientific review.

material_warnings.name: T1_ER20_W250_Q10_high_fragment_rate
material_warnings.rationale: High single-day hit fragmentation is reported for scientific review.

material_warnings.name: T1_ER20_W500_Q10_high_fragment_rate
material_warnings.rationale: High single-day hit fragmentation is reported for scientific review.

material_warnings.name: T_layer_W120_Q10_joint_high_fragmentation
material_warnings.rationale: T layer q10 joint both-hit events are directionally consistent but concentrated in short fragments.

material_warnings.name: T_layer_W250_Q10_joint_high_fragmentation
material_warnings.rationale: T layer q10 joint both-hit events are directionally consistent but concentrated in short fragments.

material_warnings.name: T_layer_W500_Q10_joint_high_fragmentation
material_warnings.rationale: T layer q10 joint both-hit events are directionally consistent but concentrated in short fragments.

material_warnings.name: T2_AbsTrendT20_extreme_right_tail
material_warnings.rationale: Extreme right tail is a raw-scale numerical warning; it does not by itself invalidate the low-tail trend-neutrality definition.

material_warnings.name: P1_NATR14_W120_nonuniform_strict_past_percentile_distribution
material_warnings.rationale: Strict-past percentile buckets are materially nonuniform; nominal q is a threshold, not a guaranteed target coverage.

material_warnings.name: V1_TurnoverShrink20_60_W120_nonuniform_strict_past_percentile_distribution
